folio.label: 64r
folio.l: And thus by wytte , and subtil enquerynge
Imagyned was , by whom this harm gan sprynge
¢ The hond was knowe , that the &lbar;re wroot
And al the venym , of this cursed dede
But in what wyse , certeynly I not
The effect is this , that Alla out of dreede
His moder slougú , that moun~ men pleynly reede
For that she traytour was , to hire ligeaunce
Thus enditú Donegild , witú myschaunce
¢ The sorwe that this Alla , nygút and day
Maketú for his wyf , and for his child also
There is no tonge , that it telle may
But now wol I , vn to Custaunce go
That fletetú in the See , in peyne and woo
Fyue ©er and more , as lyked cristes sonde
That hire ship~ approched , vn to the londe
¢ Vnder an hethen Castel , at the last
Of whicú the name , in my text , nou©t I fynde
Custaunce and eke hire child , the see vp cast
Almygúty god , that saued al mankynde
Haue oon Custaunce , & on hire child sum mynde
That fallen is , in hethen hand eft sone
In poynt to spille , as I shal telle ©ow sone
¢ Doun fro the Castel , cometú there many a wygút
To gauren on this Ship~ , and on Custaunce
But shortly from the Castel , on a nygút
The lordes styward , god ©eue hi~ myschaunce
A theef æat had reneyed , oure creaunce
Come in to the Ship~ allone , and seid he shulde
Hire lemman be , wheiæä so she wolde or nolde
¢ Woo was this wrecched womman , thoo bygon
Hire child cryed , and she cryed pytously
But blisful Mary halp~ , hire rigút a noon
For with here strogelyngö , wel and mygútily
The thef fel ouer bord , al sodeynly
And in the See he dreynt , for vengeaunce
And thus hatú Crist , vnwemmed kept Custaunce
¢ O foule lust of luxurie , lo thyn ende
Nat oonly that æè feyntest , mannes mynde
But verraily thow wold , his body shende
The ende of thy werk , or of thy lustes blynde
Is compleynynge , how many oon , may men fynde
That nougút for werk , sumtyme but for the entent
To doon this synne , ben outher slayn or shent

note.notetxt: 833The pen is leaving on the paper havier storokes both in f 64r and in 63v, the same problems can be seen in the next two folios: double check.ODR
